THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUSS, MARILYN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 856 WEBSTER STREET #D, S.F. $2,470.54 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,470.54, STAYED UNTIL JAN-05-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. IF THE DEFT VACATES THE UNIT ON A TIMELY BASIS, THE JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED SATISFIED. THE DEFT WAIVES ANY FURTHER S/E BEYOND 01/05/99.
